title: astragalus sarbasnensis
intro: Astragalus sarbasnensis, also known as Sarbaz astragalus, is a type of plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to Iran and is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sarbasnensis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus sarbasnensis can be prepared in various forms, such as capsules, tablets, or teas, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
